title: bupleurum kohistanicum
intro: Bupleurum kohistanicum, also known as Himalayan bupleurum, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) that is native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Bupleurum kohistanicum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
